metrics.command_line: export PYTHON_EGG_CACHE=`pwd` &&   (macs2 callpeak   -t '/galaxy/server/database/objects/9/4/6/dataset_9465e139-ce2c-4108-8b17-da2d6cb87a27.dat'  --name forward_and_reverse    --format BAMPE   --gsize '2913022398'      --SPMR     --call-summits  --keep-dup '1'  --d-min 20 --buffer-size 100000  --bdg  --qvalue '0.05'  --mfold '5' '50'  --bw '300'  2>&1 > macs2_stderr) && cp forward_and_reverse_peaks.xls '/galaxy/server/database/jobs_directory/000/322/outputs/dataset_8d208258-b8c3-4cba-9b23-8b7725592e76.dat'   && ( count=`ls -1 forward_and_reverse* 2>/dev/null | wc -l`; if [ $count != 0 ]; then mkdir '/galaxy/server/database/jobs_directory/000/322/outputs/dataset_db742857-b7c3-43f2-b37a-15660f731272_files' && cp -r forward_and_reverse* '/galaxy/server/database/jobs_directory/000/322/outputs/dataset_db742857-b7c3-43f2-b37a-15660f731272_files' && python '/cvmfs/cloud.galaxyproject.org/tools/toolshed.g2.bx.psu.edu/repos/iuc/macs2/86e2413cf3f8/macs2/dir2html.py' '/galaxy/server/database/jobs_directory/000/322/outputs/dataset_db742857-b7c3-43f2-b37a-15660f731272_files' macs2_stderr > '/galaxy/server/database/jobs_directory/000/322/outputs/dataset_db742857-b7c3-43f2-b37a-15660f731272.dat'; fi; ) && exit_code_for_galaxy=$? && cat macs2_stderr 2>&1 && (exit $exit_code_for_galaxy)

params.advanced_options: {"broad_options": {"__current_case__": 1, "broad_options_selector": "nobroad", "call_summits": true}, "buffer_size": "100000", "d_min": "20", "keep_dup_options": {"__current_case__": 1, "keep_dup_options_selector": "1"}, "llocal": null, "nolambda": false, "ratio": null, "slocal": null, "spmr": true, "to_large": false}
